headline: Uber Jury Verdict Puts Legal Risks Beside Valuation Upside For Investors
summary: A federal jury recently found Uber (NYSE:UBER) legally responsible for a 2019 passenger assault. The verdict is part of a nationwide multi-district litigation focused on passenger sexual assault. Jurors held Uber liable as a common carrier, a classification with potential implications for future cases. This is the second major verdict against Uber this year, with more bellwether trials scheduled. Uber operates a global ride hailing and delivery platform, connecting drivers, couriers and...
